events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: undersized service conductors at rough-complete stage. NEC Art. 230 governs service entrance conductors. Undersized conductors are non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical. Service entrance conductors undersized = fire hazard, code violation. Critical risk.
